dialogues.text: You look like you need this more than I do. Take the eighty. No strings.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. Nobody needs to know where it came from.
dialogues.no_response: Your call. Pride's expensive though. Keep that in mind.

dialogues.text: I don't ask questions. I don't want answers. Eighty. Take it.
dialogues.no_response: Different people make different choices. I respect that.

dialogues.text: I've seen worse situations than yours. Not many. Take the eighty.
dialogues.yes_response: Right answer. Now go handle what you came here to handle.
dialogues.no_response: You sure? Look at yourself. Take the money.

dialogues.text: I've got eighty here that needs a new home. Could be yours.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. Clean transaction. That's all this was.
dialogues.no_response: Your loss. Somebody else'll take it.

dialogues.text: I don't do charity. But I do recognize when someone's on a clock. Eighty.
dialogues.yes_response: Yeah. I can tell. Take it. You'll need it before the day's out.
dialogues.no_response: Suit yourself. I've got other places to be.

dialogues.text: This is clean. Whatever you think about me — this money is clean. Eighty.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. What you do with it is your business.
dialogues.no_response: Lot of principles for someone who looks the way you look.

dialogues.text: I'm not going to pretend I don't see what's going on with you. Eighty. Take it.
dialogues.no_response: Okay. But come back if you change your mind. No judgment.

dialogues.text: You need it. I've got it. The rest is just noise. Eighty.
dialogues.yes_response: Now walk. Don't look back at me.
dialogues.no_response: They always come back. I'll be here.

dialogues.text: I don't care what you're dealing with. I care that you're dealing with it. Eighty.
dialogues.yes_response: Go handle it. That's the whole point.
dialogues.no_response: Alright. Good luck. I mean that.

dialogues.text: Last time I'm offering. Eighty. We don't have to be anything to each other.
dialogues.no_response: Alright. Take care of yourself out there.
